code: @Manual{,   title = {evolution: A Client for 'Evolution Cloud API'},   author = {Andre Leite and Hugo Vasconcelos and Diogo Bezerra},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://github.com/StrategicProjects/evolution/}, }

what: A Client for Evolution Cloud API
title: A Client for Evolution Cloud API
text: R wrapper Evolution API v2 — lightweight WhatsApp integration API.

title: A Client for Evolution Cloud API
text: evolution tidy-style R client Evolution API v2, RESTful platform enables automation across WhatsApp (via Web/Baileys Cloud API modes). wraps HTTP calls using {httr2}, exposes snake_case helper functions, integrates structured logging {cli} use modern R pipelines production tasks. evolution can: Send plain text, media (image/video/document), WhatsApp audio, stickers, status stories Send locations, contacts, interactive buttons, polls, list messages Check numbers registered WhatsApp Use options(evolution.timeout) control timeouts verbose = TRUE detailed CLI logs timing Note: package independent wrapper Evolution API affiliated WhatsApp Meta.

title: A Client for Evolution Cloud API
code: # From CRAN install.packages("evolution")  # Or the development version from GitHub # install.packages("remotes") remotes::install_github("StrategicProjects/evolution")

title: A Client for Evolution Cloud API
code: library(evolution)  client <- evo_client(   base_url = "https://YOUR-HOST",   api_key  = Sys.getenv("EVO_APIKEY"),   instance = "yourInstance" )  # Optional: set a global timeout (default: 60s) options(evolution.timeout = 30)  # Send a simple message send_text(client, "5581999990000", "Hello from R!", verbose = TRUE)

title: A Client for Evolution Cloud API
text: ⚠️ send_buttons() send_list() — Baileys users: Interactive buttons list messages supported Baileys (WhatsApp Web) connector likely discontinued Evolution API. Use send_poll() instead. endpoints work Cloud API connector. 💡 Local file support: send_media(), send_sticker(), send_whatsapp_audio() accept local file paths (including ~/...) — files auto-encoded base64 via base64enc.

title: A Client for Evolution Cloud API
code: send_text(client, "5581999990000", "Hello world!",           delay = 1200, link_preview = FALSE, verbose = TRUE)

title: A Client for Evolution Cloud API
code: # From URL send_media(client, "5581999990000", "image", "image/png",            media = "https://www.r-project.org/logo/Rlogo.png",            file_name = "Rlogo.png", caption = "R Logo")  # From local file send_media(client, "5581999990000", "document", "application/pdf",            media = "report.pdf", file_name = "report.pdf",            caption = "Monthly Report")

title: A Client for Evolution Cloud API
code: send_contact(client, "5581999990000",   contact = list(     fullName     = "Jane Doe",     phoneNumber  = "+5581999990000",     organization = "Company Ltd.",     email        = "jane@example.com",     url          = "https://company.com"   ))

title: A Client for Evolution Cloud API
code: send_location(client, "5581999990000",   latitude = -8.05, longitude = -34.88,   name = "Recife Antigo", address = "Marco Zero - Recife/PE")

title: A Client for Evolution Cloud API
code: send_list(client, "5581999990000",   title = "Our Menu",   description = "Select from the options below:",   button_text = "View options",   sections = list(     list(title = "Drinks", rows = list(       list(title = "Coffee", description = "Hot coffee", rowId = "1"),       list(title = "Tea",    description = "Green tea",  rowId = "2")     ))   ))

title: A Client for Evolution Cloud API
A Client for Evolution Cloud API
text: verbose = TRUE, every function call logs structured diagnostics: API error occurs, get actionable message:
code: ── evoapi POST message/sendText/myInstance ── ℹ Timeout: 60s ℹ Body:   List of 2    $ number: chr "5581999990000"    $ text  : chr "Hello from R!" ✔ HTTP 201 (0.34s) ℹ Content-Type: application/json ℹ Response: {"key":{"remoteJid":"5581999990000@s.whatsapp.net", ...} Error in `.evo_post()`: ✖ Evolution API returned HTTP 400. ℹ Endpoint: POST message/sendText/myInstance ! API message: instance requires property "number"

title: A Client for Evolution Cloud API
text: Never hardcode API keys. Use Sys.getenv("EVO_APIKEY") .Renviron. Base64 media: package auto-strips data:*;base64, prefixes. Contact wuid: automatically generated <digits>@s.whatsapp.net. Debugging: use verbose = TRUE compare working curl request.

title: A Client for Evolution Cloud API
text: Contributions welcome! Open issues reproducible examples sanitised logs (remove API keys phone numbers).

title: A Client for Evolution Cloud API

what: Create an Evolution API client — evo_client
title: Create an Evolution API client — evo_client
text: Creates preconfigured httr2 client call Evolution API v2. sets apikey header, custom User-Agent basic automatic retries. returned object used every send_*() function stores base request (req) instance name repeat .

title: Create an Evolution API client — evo_client
code: evo_client(base_url, api_key, instance)

title: Create an Evolution API client — evo_client
text: base_url Character. Server base URL (trailing slash), e.g. "https://-host". api_key Character. API key (sent apikey header). Prefer Sys.getenv("EVO_APIKEY") avoid hardcoding secrets. instance Character. Instance name/ID used endpoint paths.

title: Create an Evolution API client — evo_client
text: object class evo_client fields req (httr2 request) instance.

title: Create an Evolution API client — evo_client
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ client <- evo_client(   base_url = "https://your-evolution-host.com",   api_key  = Sys.getenv("EVO_APIKEY"),   instance = "myInstance" ) } # }

title: Build a WhatsApp JID from a raw phone number — jid
text: Normalises raw phone number removing spaces, dashes, parentheses, leading + sign, appends @s.whatsapp.net.

title: Build a WhatsApp JID from a raw phone number — jid
code: jid(number)

title: Build a WhatsApp JID from a raw phone number — jid
text: number Character scalar vector. Raw phone number(s) (e.g., "+5581999990000").

title: Build a WhatsApp JID from a raw phone number — jid
text: Character JID(s) (e.g., "5581999990000@s.whatsapp.net").

title: Build a WhatsApp JID from a raw phone number — jid
Send interactive buttons — send_buttons
text: Sends message interactive buttons via Evolution API v2.

title: Send interactive buttons — send_buttons
code: send_buttons(   client,   number,   title,   description,   footer,   buttons,   delay = NULL,   link_preview = NULL,   mentions_everyone = NULL,   verbose = FALSE )

title: Send interactive buttons — send_buttons
text: client evo_client() object. number Character. Recipient number country code (e.g., "5581999990000" "+5581999990000"). title Character. Button message title. description Character. Button message description/body. footer Character. Footer text. buttons List buttons. button named list following API specification (see Evolution API docs). delay Integer (ms). Optional presence delay sending. Simulates typing message sent. link_preview Logical. Enable URL link preview message. mentions_everyone Logical. Mention everyone group. verbose Logical. TRUE, logs request/response details cli.

title: Send interactive buttons — send_buttons
text: named list API response. HTTP status code stored attr(result, "http_status").

title: Send interactive buttons — send_buttons
text: Baileys connector: Interactive buttons supported Baileys (WhatsApp Web) connector likely discontinued. endpoint fully supported Cloud API connector. Baileys, consider using send_poll() alternative.

title: Send interactive buttons — send_buttons
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ send_buttons(client, "5581999990000",   title = "Choose",   description = "Pick an option:",   footer = "Powered by R",   buttons = list(     list(type = "reply", title = "Option A"),     list(type = "reply", title = "Option B")   )) } # }

what: Send a WhatsApp contact (auto-generate wuid) — send_contact
title: Send a WhatsApp contact (auto-generate wuid) — send_contact
text: Sends one contacts following Evolution API v2 format. Automatically generates wuid field <digits>@s.whatsapp.net contact's phone number (number provided).

title: Send a WhatsApp contact (auto-generate wuid) — send_contact
code: send_contact(client, number, contact, verbose = FALSE)

title: Send a WhatsApp contact (auto-generate wuid) — send_contact
text: client evo_client() object. number Recipient number (e.g., "5581999990000"). contact Either: named list fields fullName, phoneNumber, organization, email, url; list lists (send multiple contacts). wuid field auto-generated missing. verbose Logical; TRUE, shows detailed logs.

title: Send a WhatsApp contact (auto-generate wuid) — send_contact
text: Parsed JSON response list (see .evo_post() details).

title: Send a WhatsApp contact (auto-generate wuid) — send_contact
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ send_contact(client, "5581999990000",   contact = list(     fullName     = "Jane Doe",     phoneNumber  = "+5581999990000",     organization = "Company Ltd.",     email = "jane@example.com",     url   = "https://company.com"   )) } # }

title: Send a list message — send_list
text: Sends interactive list message via Evolution API v2. List messages display menu selectable options organised sections.

title: Send a list message — send_list
code: send_list(   client,   number,   title,   description,   button_text,   sections,   footer = "",   delay = NULL,   verbose = FALSE )

title: Send a list message — send_list
text: client evo_client() object. number Character. Recipient number country code (e.g., "5581999990000" "+5581999990000"). title Character. List message title. description Character. List message body text. button_text Character. Text displayed list button (e.g., "View options"). sections list section objects. section named list title rows, rows list named lists containing title, optional description, optional rowId. footer Character. Footer text (required API, defaults ""). delay Integer (ms). Optional presence delay sending. Simulates typing message sent. verbose Logical. TRUE, logs request/response details cli.

title: Send a list message — send_list
text: named list API response. HTTP status code stored attr(result, "http_status").

title: Send a list message — send_list
text: Baileys connector: Interactive list messages supported Baileys (WhatsApp Web) connector likely discontinued. endpoint fully supported Cloud API connector. Baileys, consider using send_poll() alternative.

title: Send a list message — send_list
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ send_list(client, "5581999990000",   title = "Our Menu",   description = "Select from the options below:",   button_text = "View options",   footer = "Powered by R",   sections = list(     list(title = "Drinks", rows = list(       list(title = "Coffee", description = "Hot coffee", rowId = "1"),       list(title = "Tea",    description = "Green tea",  rowId = "2")     )),     list(title = "Food", rows = list(       list(title = "Cake", description = "Chocolate cake", rowId = "3")     ))   )) } # }

title: Send a location — send_location
text: Sends geographic location pin via Evolution API v2.

title: Send a location — send_location
code: send_location(   client,   number,   latitude,   longitude,   name = NULL,   address = NULL,   verbose = FALSE )

title: Send a location — send_location
text: client evo_client() object. number Character. Recipient number country code (e.g., "5581999990000" "+5581999990000"). latitude Numeric. Latitude coordinate. longitude Numeric. Longitude coordinate. name Optional character. Location label name. address Optional character. Address description. verbose Logical. TRUE, logs request/response details cli.

title: Send a location — send_location
text: named list API response. HTTP status code stored attr(result, "http_status").

title: Send a location — send_location
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ send_location(client, "5581999990000",               latitude = -8.05, longitude = -34.88,               name = "Recife Antigo", address = "Marco Zero") } # }

title: Send media (image, video, document) — send_media
text: Sends image, video, document via Evolution API v2. media argument flexible: accepts HTTP(S) URL, local file path (auto-encoded base64), raw base64, data-URI.

title: Send media (image, video, document) — send_media
code: send_media(   client,   number,   mediatype,   mimetype,   media,   file_name,   caption = NULL,   delay = NULL,   link_preview = NULL,   verbose = FALSE )

title: Send media (image, video, document) — send_media
text: client evo_client() object. number Character. Recipient number country code (e.g., "5581999990000" "+5581999990000"). mediatype One "image", "video", "document". mimetype MIME type string, e.g., "image/png", "video/mp4", "application/pdf". media media content. Can : () HTTP/HTTPS URL; (b) local file path; (c) raw base64; (d) data-URI (data:*;base64,...). file_name Suggested filename recipient (match MIME type, e.g., "report.pdf"). caption Optional caption text displayed media. delay Integer (ms). Optional presence delay sending. Simulates typing message sent. link_preview Logical. Enable URL link preview message. verbose Logical. TRUE, logs request/response details cli.

title: Send media (image, video, document) — send_media
text: named list API response. HTTP status code stored attr(result, "http_status").

title: Send media (image, video, document) — send_media
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # From URL send_media(client, "5581999990000", "image", "image/png",            media = "https://www.r-project.org/logo/Rlogo.png",            file_name = "Rlogo.png", caption = "R Logo")  # From local file send_media(client, "5581999990000", "document", "application/pdf",            media = "report.pdf", file_name = "report.pdf") } # }

title: Send a poll — send_poll
text: Sends poll (question selectable options) via Evolution API v2.

title: Send a poll — send_poll
code: send_poll(client, number, name, values, selectable_count = 1L, verbose = FALSE)

title: Send a poll — send_poll
text: client evo_client() object. number Character. Recipient number country code (e.g., "5581999990000" "+5581999990000"). name Question text displayed poll. values Character vector poll options (minimum 2). selectable_count Integer. Number options user can select (default 1L single-choice). verbose Logical. TRUE, logs request/response details cli.

title: Send a poll — send_poll
text: named list API response. HTTP status code stored attr(result, "http_status").

title: Send a poll — send_poll
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ send_poll(client, "5581999990000",   name = "Favourite language?",   values = c("R", "Python", "Julia"),   selectable_count = 1) } # }

title: React to a message — send_reaction
text: Sends emoji reaction existing message.

title: React to a message — send_reaction
code: send_reaction(client, key, reaction, verbose = FALSE)

title: React to a message — send_reaction
text: client evo_client() object. key List remoteJid, fromMe, id identifying target message. reaction Emoji string (e.g., "\U0001f44d" thumbs ). Use empty string "" remove reaction. verbose Logical. TRUE, logs request/response details cli.

title: React to a message — send_reaction
text: named list API response. HTTP status code stored attr(result, "http_status").

title: React to a message — send_reaction
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ send_reaction(client, key = list(   remoteJid = "5581999990000@s.whatsapp.net",   fromMe = TRUE,   id = "BAE594145F4C59B4" ), reaction = "\U0001f44d") } # }

title: Send a WhatsApp Status (story) — send_status
text: Posts status (story) message visible contacts. Supports text media (image, video, document, audio) types.

title: Send a WhatsApp Status (story) — send_status
code: send_status(   client,   type = c("text", "image", "video", "document", "audio"),   content,   caption = NULL,   background_color = NULL,   font = NULL,   all_contacts = FALSE,   status_jid_list = NULL,   verbose = FALSE )

title: Send a WhatsApp Status (story) — send_status
text: client evo_client() object. type One "text", "image", "video", "document", "audio". content Text (type = "text") URL/base64 media. caption Optional caption media types. background_color Hex colour text status background (e.g., "#FF5733"). font Integer font id (0–14). all_contacts Logical. TRUE, sends contacts. status_jid_list Optional character vector specific JIDs receive status. verbose Logical. TRUE, logs request/response details cli.

title: Send a WhatsApp Status (story) — send_status
text: named list API response. HTTP status code stored attr(result, "http_status").

title: Send a WhatsApp Status (story) — send_status
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ send_status(client, type = "text", content = "Hello from R!",             background_color = "#317873", font = 2, all_contacts = TRUE) } # }

text: Sends sticker image via Evolution API v2.

title: Send a sticker — send_sticker
code: send_sticker(client, number, sticker, delay = NULL, verbose = FALSE)

title: Send a sticker — send_sticker
text: client evo_client() object. number Character. Recipient number country code (e.g., "5581999990000" "+5581999990000"). sticker URL, base64-encoded sticker image, local file path (auto-encoded base64). Supports ~ expansion. delay Integer (ms). Optional presence delay sending. Simulates typing message sent. verbose Logical. TRUE, logs request/response details cli.

title: Send a sticker — send_sticker
text: named list API response. HTTP status code stored attr(result, "http_status").

title: Send a sticker — send_sticker
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ send_sticker(client, "5581999990000",              sticker = "https://example.com/sticker.webp") } # }

what: Send a plain text message — send_text
title: Send a plain text message — send_text
text: Sends plain text WhatsApp message using Evolution API v2.

title: Send a plain text message — send_text
code: send_text(   client,   number,   text,   delay = NULL,   link_preview = NULL,   mentions_everyone = NULL,   mentioned = NULL,   quoted = NULL,   verbose = FALSE )

title: Send a plain text message — send_text
text: client evo_client() object. number Character. Recipient number country code (e.g., "5581999990000" "+5581999990000"). text Character. Message body. delay Integer (ms). Optional presence delay sending. Simulates typing message sent. link_preview Logical. Enable URL link preview message. mentions_everyone Logical. Mention everyone group. mentioned Character vector JIDs mention (e.g., jid("+5581999990000")). quoted Optional list Baileys message key message reply specific message. verbose Logical. TRUE, logs request/response details cli.

title: Send a plain text message — send_text
text: named list parsed JSON response returned Evolution API, containing message key (remoteJid, fromMe, id), message, messageTimestamp, status. HTTP status code stored attr(result, "http_status").

title: Send a plain text message — send_text
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ client <- evo_client("https://my-host", Sys.getenv("EVO_APIKEY"), "myInst") send_text(client, "5581999990000", "Hello from R!", verbose = TRUE) } # }

text: Sends audio message (push--talk / voice note) via Evolution API v2.

code: send_whatsapp_audio(   client,   number,   audio,   delay = NULL,   quoted = NULL,   verbose = FALSE )

text: client evo_client() object. number Character. Recipient number country code (e.g., "5581999990000" "+5581999990000"). audio URL, base64-encoded audio, local file path (auto-encoded base64). Supports ~ expansion. delay Integer (ms). Optional presence delay sending. Simulates typing message sent. quoted Optional list Baileys message key message reply specific message. verbose Logical. TRUE, logs request/response details cli.

title: Send WhatsApp audio (voice note) — send_whatsapp_audio
text: named list API response. HTTP status code stored attr(result, "http_status").

title: Send WhatsApp audio (voice note) — send_whatsapp_audio
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ send_whatsapp_audio(client, "5581999990000",                     audio = "https://example.com/note.ogg") } # }

title: evolution 0.1.0
text: global timeout option renamed evoapi.timeout evolution.timeout match package name. previous option name silently ignored due mismatch zzz.R internal request function (#1).

title: evolution 0.1.0
text: send_list(): sends interactive list messages sections selectable rows, mapping Evolution API v2 sendList endpoint. check_is_whatsapp(): verifies whether phone numbers registered WhatsApp via chat/whatsappNumbers endpoint. print.evo_client(): new S3 print method displays instance name base URL inspecting client object.

title: evolution 0.1.0
text: .evo_post() now extracts surfaces actual API error message JSON response body (fields response$message message), instead showing generic “Evolution API error (status)” string. Non-JSON error responses (e.g., HTML 502/503 gateway error) now handled gracefully instead crashing parse error. send_*() functions now validate required arguments front clear cli error messages (e.g., "'number' must single non-empty character string"). evo_client() uses descriptive cli::cli_abort() messages instead stopifnot(), hints like "Use Sys.getenv(\"EVO_APIKEY\")" API key argument.

title: evolution 0.1.0
text: Verbose output now includes response timing (e.g., ✔ HTTP 201 (0.34s)). Verbose output now shows preview response body (first 500 characters) help debugging. Large base64 media fields truncated verbose logs keep output readable.

title: evolution 0.1.0
text: jid() now strips non-digit characters (including +) appending @s.whatsapp.net. Previously, jid("+5581...") produced invalid JID + preserved. send_list(): footer parameter now defaults "" instead NULL, Evolution API requires footerText present request body (HTTP 400 otherwise). send_sticker() send_whatsapp_audio() now pass media .normalize_media(), enabling local file paths (e.g., "~/Downloads/sticker.webp") auto-encoded base64. Previously send_media() supported . .normalize_media() now calls path.expand() ~ file paths correctly resolved user’s home directory. send_whatsapp_audio() removed unused parameters (link_preview, mentions_everyone, mentioned) part sendWhatsAppAudio API endpoint. send_buttons() now emits cli::cli_warn() runtime alerting interactive buttons supported Baileys (WhatsApp Web) connector may discontinued. warning suggests send_poll() alternative. send_list() now emits cli::cli_warn() runtime alerting interactive list messages supported Baileys (WhatsApp Web) connector may discontinued. warning suggests send_poll() alternative.

title: evolution 0.1.0
text: Fixed author name typo DESCRIPTION: “Vaconcelos” → “Vasconcelos”. README now accurately lists exported functions including send_list() check_is_whatsapp(). README includes new sections: verbose output example, configuration table, send_list() / check_is_whatsapp() usage examples. roxygen documentation improved @description, @examples, @seealso cross-references, specific @return descriptions. Added jsonlite Imports (used response preview verbose mode).

title: evolution 0.0.1
text: CRAN release: 2025-11-20 Initial CRAN release. Core messaging functions: send_text(), send_status(), send_media(), send_whatsapp_audio(), send_sticker(), send_location(), send_contact(), send_reaction(), send_buttons(), send_poll(). evo_client() factory httr2 retry apikey header. jid() helper building WhatsApp JIDs.
